t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    c1 = 1 if any(x % 3 == 1 for x in a) else 0
    c2 = 1 if any(x % 3 == 2 for x in a) else 0
    c3 = 0
    for x in a:
        r = x % 3
        if r == 0: need3 = x // 3
        elif r == 1: need3 = (x - 1) // 3
        else: need3 = (x - 2) // 3
        c3 = max(c3, need3)
    print(c1 + c2 + c3)
